name: Blue Fish with Oranges and Oregano Flowers In
recipeIngredient: 1 cup oregano flowers, or other late summer herb flowers
2 bunches Italian parsley, finely chopped to yield 1/2 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cut 4 pieces parchment paper into 16-inch square pieces.
3. Grease each piece of parchment with 1 tablespoon olive oil.
4. Season blue fish with salt and pepper.
5. Place the seasoned blue fish in the center of each piece of parchment.
6. Divide orange segments, oregano flowers, and sliced red onion evenly on top of each fillet.
7. Sprinkle parsley over the fish.
8. Fold the left half of the parchment over and crimp the edges to seal.
9. Place the parcels on a cookie sheet and bake for 10 minutes.
10. Remove from oven and keep sealed.
11. Open with scissors or knife and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
